name: Esil Radiru

stats.label: Agility
stats.description: Critical Hit Rate and Critical Hit Damage

basic.name: Radiru Spearmanship
basic.description: Esil swings her double-edged sword dealing Fire elemental damage.

core.name: Stabbing Spikes
core.description: Esil quickly leaps and then strikes down towards enemies on the ground, manifesting spikes beneath them. Knocks down targets on hit.

skill.name: Glorious Wounds
skill.description: Esil jumps towards the target, strikes quickly, and then hurls them upward. Applies Airborne. User gains Super Armor.

skill.name: Death's Rush
skill.description: After jumping and using a single slash to throw the enemy upward, Esil endows her spear with Lance power and rockets forward to quickly stab the enemy again. Applies Airborne. User gains Super Armor.

support.name: Support Fire
support.description: Esil manifests supporting fire from her Demons' Castle allies. Activates Prey effect. Increases subsequent Radiru Family Longbow damage by 24%.

qte.name: Cascading Glory
qte.description: After unleashing a barrage of manifested weapons, Esil jumps between them and stabs downward. Triggers via Extreme Evasion, Core Attack, Ultimate, Stun, or Blind. Knocks down targets.

ultimate.name: Foretold Victory
ultimate.description: A barrage of arrows from the Demons' Castle rains down on the heads of her enemies, firing for 10 seconds.

passive.name: Lance Throw
passive.description: Extends Break state duration by 3s. Activates Lance Throw via Death's Rush or Extreme Evasion: deals 800% ATK, applies Prey (max 5 stacks). Enhanced Lance Throw increases damage and Break effectiveness by 160% per stack (up to 5). Prey converts to Prey on the Weak on Break: +0.3% Fire and general damage taken per stack (max 50 stacks, 60s).

advancements: During Foretold Victory, Lance Throw damage increases 100%; inflicts Prey twice (max 10 stacks).
All team members gain 3% Attack per Fire ally (stacks up to 3).
Battle starts with full Power Gauge. Lance Throw hits charge gauge 1% and reduce Foretold Victory cooldown 1s. Instant Break on enemies below 10% Break Gauge.
Defense Penetration increases 4% per Fire team member (stacks to 3).
Death's Rush triggers enhanced Lance Throw once additionally. Triggers Prey on the Weak instead within 10s of Break state. Extends Prey on the Weak to 90s (stacks to 100).
